text:
I don't have verified instructions for deploying files to Squarespace via server-side rewrites. 

Since you're already on the **Setup tab**, that's the right place—it should generate platform-specific code or deployment steps for your Squarespace site. If the Setup tab isn't showing clear Squarespace instructions, or if you're unsure how to implement them, please email **hello@flowblinq.ai** and the team can walk you through it.

Squarespace has limited support for custom file serving compared to platforms like WordPress or Vercel, so the team may recommend an alternative approach (like DNS verification or code injection) depending on your site setup.
